query:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN score IS NULL THEN 'unscored' ELSE IFNULL(article_potential, 'unscored') END as tier,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  ROUND(AVG(score), 2) as avg_score
FROM selector_candidates 
WHERE status = 'pending'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
